rationale: In the literature review, the citing paper explicitly contrasts its contribution with Luan and Sudhir (2010), noting that prior movie advertising work examined one stage (video) while this study addresses sequential theater-to-video distribution. The citation is also used in model setup to distinguish prior ad-WOM interaction formulations from the citing paper's focus on interaction between ad and WOM effectiveness. Because the cited work helps frame the gap and the specific conceptual extension, the role is more than a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Luan and Sudhir (2010) as prior single-stage movie advertising research and then broadens that line to a joint sequential-distribution model. It extends the prior framing by modeling dynamic ad and WOM effectiveness across stages with cross-stage spillover and heterogeneity.
